summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Axes plot (0..15 × 0..8) of a cubic f(x)=0.01(x-5)^3+0.3x+3 interpreted as log N(ε) vs log(1/ε). 22 YELLOW noisy Dots scattered around a BLUE best-fit curve via LaggedStart, then Create draws the curve. Three colored tangent lines (GREEN / ORANGE / RED) drawn at x=2, 7.5, 12.5 with d≈<slope> MathTex labels showing locally different box-counting dimensions. YELLOW caption notes a single fractal dim only exists when the slope is constant.
